complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Setup Next.js Project with TypeScript and ShadCN UI
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Next.js 14 project setup with TypeScript and ShadCN UI into detailed implementation steps, including specific configuration options for tsconfig.json, ShadCN theme setup, and routing structure implementation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves setting up the foundation of the project with Next.js 14 and TypeScript, which requires moderate technical knowledge. The task already has 6 well-defined steps that cover initialization, configuration, component setup, and routing structure.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand the Vercel blob storage implementation into detailed steps covering API integration, upload functionality with progress tracking, file validation logic, cleanup mechanisms, and comprehensive error handling for various failure scenarios.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves integrating with external services (Vercel blob storage) and implementing complex functionality like progress tracking and automatic cleanup. The task requires careful error handling and validation logic for different file formats and sizes.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for the video processing pipeline, including FFmpeg integration, frame extraction algorithms, audio separation techniques, status tracking system architecture, error handling strategies, and performance optimization approaches.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This is a highly complex task involving video processing, which requires integration with FFmpeg, handling multiple media formats, and optimizing for performance constraints. The technical complexity and performance requirements make this one of the more challenging tasks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the OpenAI API integration into detailed steps covering authentication setup, Whisper API implementation for transcription, GPT-4V integration for visual analysis, rate limiting system design, error handling strategies, and cost monitoring implementation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves integrating with multiple external AI APIs, implementing rate limiting, and developing cost monitoring. The complexity comes from handling API authentication, managing rate limits, and implementing error handling for third-party services.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for the scoring engine, including specific logic for each framework point, prompt engineering for GPT-4, score normalization algorithms, recommendation generation strategies, and priority ranking methodology.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires developing complex scoring logic across 15 different framework points and creating sophisticated prompt templates for AI analysis. The task involves both technical implementation and domain knowledge about pitch evaluation frameworks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the dashboard UI implementation into detailed steps covering layout design with ShadCN components, framework score visualization, color-coding system implementation, responsive grid development, and collapsible section functionality.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating a comprehensive UI with multiple components, responsive design considerations, and interactive elements. The complexity comes from implementing a cohesive design system while ensuring responsiveness across devices.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for the interactive timeline interface, including ScrollArea component development, thumbnail display system, expandable feedback sections, click interaction handling, and timeline-transcript synchronization logic.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating an interactive timeline with complex UI interactions and synchronization between different data sources. The complexity comes from implementing smooth scrolling, handling user interactions, and maintaining synchronization with the transcript.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the video upload interface implementation into detailed steps covering drag-and-drop functionality, file selection alternatives, progress visualization techniques, validation logic, and status communication system design.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing a user-friendly upload interface with multiple input methods and real-time feedback. While technically involved, the scope is well-defined and focuses on frontend implementation with clear requirements.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for the status tracking interface, including progress indicator design, real-time update mechanisms, time estimation algorithms, error state handling, and fallback implementation for partial processing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating a real-time status tracking system with multiple states and error handling. The complexity comes from implementing accurate time estimates and handling various error conditions while providing meaningful feedback to users.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the error handling system implementation into detailed steps covering error categorization schema, user-friendly message design, fallback mechanism development, retry logic implementation, and error logging system architecture.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves developing a robust error handling system that works across the entire application. The complexity comes from categorizing different types of errors, implementing appropriate recovery mechanisms, and ensuring clear communication to users.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for the feedback collection system, including form design with ShadCN components, rating system implementation, validation logic, anonymous submission handling, and backend storage integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating a feedback form with validation and backend integration. While it requires careful implementation, the scope is relatively narrow and the technical complexity is lower compared to other tasks in the project.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the performance optimization process into detailed steps covering code splitting implementation, image optimization techniques, responsive design strategies, debouncing/throttling implementation, and API call optimization approaches.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing various performance optimization techniques across the application. The complexity comes from identifying performance bottlenecks and implementing appropriate solutions while maintaining functionality and user experience.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for analytics and tracking, including Vercel Analytics integration, custom event tracking setup, conversion funnel configuration, monitoring dashboard development, and cost tracking implementation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves integrating analytics tools and implementing custom tracking. While it requires careful implementation to ensure accurate data collection, the technical complexity is moderate with well-defined requirements.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the recommendation system implementation into detailed steps covering prioritization algorithm design, template development for suggestions, timeline integration, contextual feedback generation, and export functionality implementation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating an intelligent recommendation system based on analysis results. The complexity comes from developing algorithms to prioritize recommendations and generate contextual feedback based on slide content and scores.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for the landing page, including layout design for framework explanation, benefits section development, call-to-action implementation, results preview integration, and responsive design techniques.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating a relatively straightforward landing page with static content and basic interactivity. The technical complexity is low, focusing primarily on content presentation and responsive design.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Vercel deployment setup into detailed steps covering GitHub integration, environment variable configuration, automatic deployment setup, serverless function implementation, and preview deployment configuration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves configuring the deployment pipeline on Vercel, which requires understanding of CI/CD concepts and serverless architecture. While technically involved, the scope is well-defined with clear requirements.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for security measures, including HTTPS configuration, CORS policy setup, input sanitization techniques, rate limiting implementation, and secure API key management strategies.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing various security measures to protect the application and user data. The complexity comes from addressing multiple security concerns and implementing appropriate protections against different types of attacks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the documentation creation process into detailed steps covering step-by-step guide development, FAQ compilation, framework explanation writing, in-app help text implementation, and troubleshooting guide creation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating comprehensive documentation for users. While it requires clear communication and thorough coverage of application features, the technical complexity is relatively low compared to implementation tasks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Detail the implementation steps for the cost management system, including real-time tracking mechanisms, spending cap implementation, admin dashboard development, alert system design, and API usage optimization strategies.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves developing a system to monitor and control API usage costs, which requires integration with billing APIs and implementation of monitoring and alerting mechanisms. The complexity comes from ensuring accurate cost tracking and implementing effective controls.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Conduct End-to-End Testing and Bug Fixing
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the testing and bug fixing process into detailed steps covering test script development, manual testing procedures, cross-browser testing methodology, device testing approach, bug prioritization framework, and performance testing strategies.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves comprehensive testing across the entire application and fixing identified issues. The complexity comes from the broad scope, covering multiple testing approaches and requiring coordination across all components of the application.
